# Dani Real Estate and Developers LLP
# Official site: https://www.danirealstateanddeveloper.com
# Contact: danxsaeed@gmail.com | WhatsApp +92 332 5076025 | Haripur, KPK, Pakistan

## About
SECP-registered real estate developers in Haripur since 2008. Residential, commercial, plotting, and flagship projects including Haripur Hills, Aman Enclave, China Town, and Danial Gardens.
